code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_AuthVault] --> NotStarted: Test available
    
    NotStarted --> InProgress: User clicks "Start Test"
    
    state InProgress {FinTech_LedgerService] --> AnsweringQuestions
        AnsweringQuestions --> AnsweringQuestions: Select/Change answer
        AnsweringQuestions --> MarkedForReview: Mark for review
        MarkedForReview --> AnsweringQuestions: Continue answering
    }
    
    InProgress --> Submitted: User clicks submit
    InProgress --> AutoSubmitted: Timer expires
    
    Submitted --> ResultsCalculated: System calculates score
    AutoSubmitted --> ResultsCalculated: System calculates score
    
    ResultsCalculated --> Analyzed: System analyzes performance
    
    state Analyzed {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> ScoreGenerated
        ScoreGenerated --> SectionBreakdownCreated
        SectionBreakdownCreated --> TopicBreakdownCreated
        TopicBreakdownCreated --> WeakAreasIdentified
        WeakAreasIdentified --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
    }
    
    Analyzed --> PracticeRecommended: Weak topics found
    Analyzed --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]: No weak topics
    
    PracticeRecommended --> NotStarted: Practice test scheduled
    
    note right of InProgress
        attempt.status: in_progress
        Timer running
        Answers being recorded
    end note
    
    note right of Submitted
        attempt.status: submitted
        submittedAt: timestamp
    end note
    
    note right of AutoSubmitted
        attempt.status: auto_submitted
        Forced submission by system
    end note
    
    note right of Analyzed
        score, correctAnswers calculated
        sectionBreakdown JSON created
        topicBreakdown JSON created
        weak_topics updated
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为金融科技认证考试系统画一个状态图，核心流程是从AuthVault获取可用测试，然后进入答题状态。关键状态包括NotStarted、InProgress和Submitted，还有系统自动提交的AutoSubmitted分支。
明白了。InProgress内部需要展开子状态吗？比如答题和标记待复查的状态？还有Timer过期触发AutoSubmitted这个细节要体现出来吗？
对，InProgress里要包含AnsweringQuestions和MarkedForReview的循环，用户可以标记题目再回来答。Timer过期必须画出来，这是合规要求。另外提交后要进入ResultsCalculated，然后到Analyzed状态做深度分析。
好的，我先把主线画出来：NotStarted到InProgress是用户点击开始，InProgress分出Submitted和AutoSubmitted两条线，都汇聚到ResultsCalculated。Analyzed作为复合状态，内部包含ScoreGenerated、SectionBreakdownCreated这些分析步骤。
Analyzed之后要有分支：如果发现WeakAreas就走到PracticeRecommended，推荐练习后回到NotStarted安排新测试；如果没有弱项就直接到PaymentGateway完成支付认证。这里弱项识别要放在Analyzed内部最后一步。
确认一下Analyzed内部的顺序：ScoreGenerated → SectionBreakdownCreated → TopicBreakdownCreated → WeakAreasIdentified，最后回到LedgerService？还有几个关键状态需要加注释说明attempt.status吗？
顺序正确。注释要加在InProgress、Submitted、AutoSubmitted和Analyzed旁边，分别说明Timer运行状态、提交时间戳、强制提交原因，以及分析阶段生成的JSON数据结构。
完成了。状态图包含：从AuthVault开始的完整生命周期，InProgress内部的答题循环和标记复查，Timer触发的自动提交，ResultsCalculated后的统一分析流程，以及基于WeakAreas的分支决策。所有注释也已添加。
